##LOCALITY=El Criollo mine, Cordoba Province, Argentina
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Isolated and intergrown light greenish-yellow rhombic tablets associated with strengite, quartz and fine-grained manganese oxides. Type sample, described in Hochleitner et al (2024)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250107
